title: Geronimo and the Gold Medal
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo covers the Olympics in Athens and teams up with detective Hercule Poirat to catch a cheating count who wins gold medals with a sneaky animal-power machine! 🥇

q.en: Who ordered Geronimo to travel to Athens and report on the Olympics?
q.zh: 是谁命令杰罗尼摩去雅典报道奥运会的？

explain.en: Grandfather William Shortpaws barked orders at Geronimo by phone, telling him to pack, fly to Athens, and cover the Olympics for The Rodent's Gazette.
explain.zh: 威廉·肖特波爷爷在电话里对杰罗尼摩下了命令，让他收拾行李飞往雅典，为《老鼠公报》报道奥运会。

q.en: The flight attendant on Geronimo's plane was really someone in disguise. Who was it?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩飞机上的空乘人员其实是伪装起来的某个人。那是谁？

options.zh: 赫拉克·波瓦，一位私家侦探
他的妹妹西奥·斯提尔顿
赛勒斯·冯·斯努特拉特伯爵

explain.en: Geronimo noticed a banana peel in the attendant's pocket; it was his old friend Hercule Poirat, a master of disguise and detective, who had fooled even him.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩注意到那位空乘口袋里露出一根香蕉皮，原来是他的老朋友赫拉克·波瓦——一位伪装高手兼侦探，连他都骗过了。

q.en: Which fake country kept winning Olympic events but does not really exist?
q.zh: 哪个假国家一直赢得奥运比赛，但实际上根本不存在？

explain.en: Hercule pointed out that one country on the list did not exist: Mousylvania. Its athletes all looked alike and only entered individual events.
explain.zh: 赫拉克指出参赛国家名单里有一个根本不存在的国家：鼠伐尼亚。它的选手长得一模一样，而且只参加个人项目。

q.en: How did Geronimo and Hercule get inside the guarded Olympic Village?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和赫拉克是怎样进入守卫森严的奥运村的？

options.zh: 出示杰罗尼摩的记者证

explain.en: After Hercule suggested silly plans, Geronimo laughed and said they could just use his press pass; the guard let them in.
explain.zh: 在赫拉克提出一堆滑稽计划后，杰罗尼摩笑着说他们可以用自己的记者证，卫兵就放他们进去了。

q.en: Inside the secret lab, what old friend of Geronimo was chained to the machine?
q.zh: 在秘密实验室里，被锁在机器上的是杰罗尼摩的哪位老朋友？

options.zh: 赛勒斯·冯·斯努特拉特伯爵

explain.en: The chained old rodent was Professor Paws von Volt, Geronimo's friend who had mysteriously disappeared about a year earlier while doing secret genetics work.
explain.zh: 被锁在机器上的是波兹·冯·沃尔特教授，他是杰罗尼摩的朋友，大约一年前在从事秘密基因研究时神秘失踪了。

q.en: What is the name of the cheating athlete who wanted to be the world's greatest?
q.zh: 那个想成为全世界最伟大运动员的作弊选手叫什么名字？

options.zh: 赛勒斯·冯·斯努特拉特伯爵

explain.en: The elegant, cold-eyed count was Cyrus von Snootrat, whose family crest read 'The end justifies the means!' He forced the professor to help him cheat.
explain.zh: 那位优雅、眼神冰冷的伯爵就是赛勒斯·冯·斯努特拉特，他的家族徽章上写着“目的证明手段正当”。他逼教授帮他作弊。

q.en: What machine transferred animal powers like a jaguar's speed into the count?
q.zh: 是什么机器把美洲豹的速度等动物能力转移到伯爵身上的？

explain.en: Professor von Volt invented the Voltometer, a machine that could transfer characteristics from one subject to another, which the count abused to win.
explain.zh: 沃尔特教授发明了沃尔特仪，这台机器能把一种生物的特征转移到另一种生物身上，伯爵滥用它来赢得比赛。

q.en: To stop the count, what animal did Professor von Volt secretly swap in for the rabbit?
q.zh: 为了阻止伯爵，沃尔特教授偷偷把兔子换成了什么动物？

explain.en: While the count was distracted, the professor swapped the rabbit with a snail, so the machine gave him a snail's slowness instead of a rabbit's speed.
explain.zh: 趁伯爵分神时，教授把兔子换成了一只蜗牛，于是机器给了他蜗牛的缓慢，而不是兔子的速度。

q.en: What did Count von Snootrat do that destroyed the Voltometer for good?
q.zh: 赛勒斯伯爵做了什么，把沃尔特仪永远毁掉了？

options.en: He pushed the red self-destruct button
options.zh: 他按下了红色的自毁按钮

explain.en: When the others were chatting, the count leapt to the machine and pushed the red self-destruct button; the Voltometer smoked and melted.
explain.zh: 趁大家聊天时，伯爵冲向机器按下了红色自毁按钮，沃尔特仪冒烟熔化成了一堆废铁。

q.en: Hercule offered Geronimo a banana that did not taste like a banana. What did it taste like?
q.zh: 赫拉克给杰罗尼摩一根吃起来不像香蕉的香蕉。它到底是什么味道？

options.en: Cheese, because Hercule soaked it in melted cheese
options.zh: 奶酪，因为赫拉克把它泡在融化的奶酪里

explain.en: Hercule explained he had soaked the banana in melted cheese all night, so it tasted like delicious cheese, not banana.
explain.zh: 赫拉克解释说他把香蕉在融化的奶酪里泡了一整夜，所以吃起来是美味的奶酪味，而不是香蕉味。
